question: 1H Spread: Cavaliers (-2.5)
description:

This market will resolve to "Cavaliers" if the Cavaliers are winning by 3 or more points at halftime.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 6, 4AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:

question: XRP Up or Down - January 6, 4AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

In the upcoming Liga MX game between Club Necaxa and Atlas FC, scheduled for January 17 at 6:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Club Necaxa and Atlas FC combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligamx.net. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Trey McBride: Receiving Yards O/U 68.5
description:
In the upcoming NFL game, scheduled for January 4 at 4:25 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Trey McBride records 69 or more receiving yards in regulation and overtime combined.

This market will resolve to "Under" if Trey McBride records fewer than 69 receiving yards in regulation and overtime combined.

Receiving yards are based on official NFL statistics. If the player does not play or is inactive, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source will be the official NFL game book as published on NFL.com.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be -2°C or below on January 6?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 6 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification: Alejandro Tabilo vs Yi Zhou
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Alejandro Tabilo and Yi Zhou in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification, scheduled for January 4 at 10:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Tabilo' if Alejandro Tabilo advances against Yi Zhou.

This market will resolve to 'Zhou' if Yi Zhou advances against Alejandro Tabilo.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will the highest temperature in Buenos Aires be 31°C or below on January 6?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 6 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ar/ezeiza/SAEZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

events.title: Highest temperature in Buenos Aires on January 6?
events.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 6 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Minister Pistarini Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ar/ezeiza/SAEZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Brisbane International: Denis Shapovalov vs Raphael Collignon
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Denis Shapovalov and Raphael Collignon in the Brisbane International, scheduled for January 5 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Shapovalov' if Denis Shapovalov advances against Raphael Collignon.

This market will resolve to 'Collignon' if Raphael Collignon advances against Denis Shapovalov.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 6, 7AM ET
description:

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Swansea City AFC vs. Birmingham City FC: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Swansea City AFC and Birmingham City FC, scheduled for January 17 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Swansea City AFC and Birmingham City FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Set 1 Winner: Kenin vs Alexandrova
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Sofia Kenin and Ekaterina Alexandrova in the Brisbane International, scheduled for January 6 2026.
This market will resolve to “Kenin” if Sofia Kenin wins the first set. It will resolve to “Alexandrova” if Ekaterina Alexandrova wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA match statistics.
groupItemTitle: Brisbane International: Sofia Kenin vs Ekaterina Alexandrova Set 1 Winner

events.title: Brisbane International: Sofia Kenin vs Ekaterina Alexandrova
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Sofia Kenin and Ekaterina Alexandrova in the Brisbane International, scheduled for January 5 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Kenin' if Sofia Kenin advances against Ekaterina Alexandrova.

This market will resolve to 'Alexandrova' if Ekaterina Alexandrova advances against Sofia Kenin.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Kenin vs. Alexandrova: Set 1 Games O/U 8.5
description:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 9. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.

question: Oxford United FC vs. Bristol City FC: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Oxford United FC and Bristol City FC, scheduled for January 17 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Oxford United FC and Bristol City FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Preston North End FC and Derby County FC, scheduled for January 17 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Preston North End FC and Derby County FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

description:

question: Nava vs. Djere: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Emilio Nava and Laslo Djere in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification, scheduled for January 5 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP statistics.

events.title: Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification: Emilio Nava vs Laslo Djere
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Emilio Nava and Laslo Djere in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification, scheduled for January 4 at 11:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Nava' if Emilio Nava advances against Laslo Djere.

This market will resolve to 'Djere' if Laslo Djere advances against Emilio Nava.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Ipswich Town FC vs. Blackburn Rovers FC: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Ipswich Town FC and Blackburn Rovers FC, scheduled for January 17 at 7:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Ipswich Town FC and Blackburn Rovers FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Iva Jovic and Gabriela Knutson in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 4 at 5:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Jovic' if Iva Jovic advances against Gabriela Knutson.

This market will resolve to 'Knutson' if Gabriela Knutson advances against Iva Jovic.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

description:

question: Texans Team Total: O/U 25.5
description:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Texans score 26 or more points in this game.

question: Dota 2: Execration vs REKONIX (BO3)
description:
This market will resolve to "Execration" if Execration win against REKONIX in the named Dota 2 match in the BLAST Slam Southeast Asia Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 5 at 12:00AM ET.
